name: PointCloudItem
summary: Represents a single item in a point cloud. A PointCloud item always has a location, but it has an optional normal vector and color.

properties.name: Color
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of this point cloud item. If this point cloud item does not have a color, System.Drawing.Color.Black is returned.

properties.name: Hidden
properties.summary: Gets or sets the hidden flag of this point cloud item. If this point cloud item does not have a hidden flag, false is returned.

properties.name: Index
properties.summary: Gets the index of this point cloud item.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: Gets or sets the location of this point cloud item.

properties.name: Normal
properties.summary: Gets or sets the normal vector for this point cloud item. If this point cloud item does not have a normal vector, Vector3d.Unset is returned.

properties.name: PointValue
properties.summary: Gets or set the extra value of this point cloud item. The extra value can be used to store a user-defined value, such as intensity. If this point cloud item does not have an extra value, RhinoMath.UnsetValue is returned.

properties.name: X
properties.summary: Gets or sets the X component of this point cloud item location.

properties.name: Y
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Y component of this point cloud item location.

properties.name: Z
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Z component of this point cloud item location.
